---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
---

## Problem statement

What is the limitation or pain point?

## Proposed solution

What should the operator, chart, or workflow do instead?

## Alternatives considered

List other approaches you considered, if any.

## Notes

- Is this backward compatible?
- Does it affect release artifacts, RBAC, or observability?
- Does it need docs or tests?
